Row.Text: Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose — Leader
Adds Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose, hero of the Indian independence movement, as a playable leader.
Subhas Chandra Bose
Netaji, Supreme Commander of the Azad Hind Fauj and relentless organizer of the struggle for complete independence.
Azad Hind Fauj

+5[icon:NAR_REW_COMBAT] Combat Strength for units fighting in friendly territory. +5[icon:YIELD_HAPPINESS] Happiness in settlements you did not found. +2[icon:YIELD_CULTURE] Culture per conquered settlement.
+5[icon:NAR_REW_COMBAT] Combat Strength in friendly territory (Azad Hind Fauj)
Purna Swaraj
Respects civilizations that rule only the settlements they founded. Despises those who occupy the homelands of others.
Netaji! The Azad Hind Fauj awaits your command. From Delhi's red fort to the farthest coast, lead your people to complete independence — give them your blood, and they shall give you freedom.
"Give me blood, and I shall give you freedom!"
Subhas Chandra Bose led the struggle for the independence of India, heartland of the Maurya.
The Indian National Army drew soldiers from across the subcontinent, including the old Chola lands of the south.
"Dilli Chalo!" — Bose's Indian National Army marched for Delhi, the old Mughal capital.
Springing Tiger
The leaping tiger insignia of the Azad Hind Fauj, carried into battle by soldiers marching under Bose's banner for a free India.
+1[icon:NAR_REW_COMBAT] Combat Strength for units while their owner is at war.
+{1_Amount} Springing Tiger Memento
Available from the start
Azad Hind Radio
The radio voice of the Azad Hind government, carrying Bose's call for complete independence to listeners across the world.
+1[icon:YIELD_DIPLOMACY] Influence per turn, increasing each Age.
Available from the start
